caption: The video presents information about the Gloucester Housing Authority's Sheedy Building, focusing on its preservation efforts. The scene shows a slide with an image of the building, which appears to be a multi-story structure with a modern design featuring balconies and large windows. The text on the slide details that the authority requested $86,000 in Community Preservation Act (CPA) funding to supplement state modernization formula funding of $196,000. This funding was used to replace a roof that was over 30 years old, as one unit had already been shuttered and more were at risk. The video likely discusses the importance of such funding in maintaining and preserving affordable housing units, ensuring they remain safe and habitable for residents.
